title: dryopteris cambrensis subsp. distans
intro: Dryopteris cambrensis subsp. distans is a rare, deciduous fern species native to Wales, UK. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris cambrensis subsp. distans is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
